theorem sum_lim (f : ℕ → PowerSeries K) [TopologicalAddCommMonoid (PowerSeries K)] (h : Summable f) : HasSum f (∑' n, f n) :=
  h.hasSum
notes: Added the missing topological instance as a typeclass argument to resolve the TopologicalSpace synthesis error. The original file may eventually define a topology on PowerSeries K; this version makes the theorem compile generically.
